title: Protocol-scoped validated status
claim: Repository status is validated only for current Stage 4 software/control protocol and explicitly excludes ranking/physics/TopoStream claims.
caveats: No physical interpretation claim is supported.

title: Historical report status conflict
claim: This report preserves a pre-control snapshot and is not current claim authority.

title: Slice-sensitivity blocker for candidate ranking
claim: For tested TPMS pair, slice-level variance dominates inter-candidate metric differences; single-slice ranking use is blocked.
caveats: Applies to tested pair and current metric family.
Does not imply future metric families cannot improve.

title: Sandbox multi-slice critic remains non-claiming
claim: Sandbox multi-slice critic is bounded experiment only and does not validate physics, TopoStream compatibility, or TPMS ranking.
caveats: Do not promote sandbox ordering to production claim boundary.
